creator: lantw44@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Ben Woods from comment #35)
I tried to keep PORTVERSION at 3.18.2. All patches in files directory could be successfully applied, but vinagre could not be built:

plugins/rdp/vinagre-rdp-tab.c:1127:13: error: no member named 'DisableEncryption' in 'struct rdp_settings'
  settings->DisableEncryption = FALSE;
  ~~~~~~~~  ^
7 warnings and 1 error generated.
